qa_pairs.question: How do I select files or directories for a Globus transfer?
qa_pairs.answer: To select a single file or directory, single-click on it. To highlight multiple items, use Control-click.

qa_pairs.question: After selecting files, how do I initiate a Globus transfer, and how will I be notified of its status?
qa_pairs.answer: Once files or directories are selected, click on one of the large blue buttons with white arrowheads to initiate the transfer. A unique ID will be assigned, and the transfer will start immediately. You will receive an email once the transfer is complete.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I monitor the progress and view details of my Globus transfers?
qa_pairs.answer: You can monitor transfers in progress and view details of completed transfers by clicking on the 'Activity' button located on the left side of the page.
